Norwegian company intelligence for KYC,: Norwegian company intelligence for KYC, AML, credit, ownership and risk workflows. Firmaradar is an enrichment platform that fuses the Brønnøysund registers, Skatteetaten, sanctions/PEP registers and public-grant registries into decision-ready insights — screen counterparties, map ownership and groups, score risk, and trigger flows on announcements, ownership changes and industry events.
API key from firmaradar.no › My page › A: API key from firmaradar.no › My page › API keys.
Connect your Firmaradar account. Create: Connect your Firmaradar account. Create an API key at https://firmaradar.no/min-side/api-keys. Leave the base URL unchanged unless you run a dedicated Firmaradar instance.
Find Norwegian companies by name, indust: Find Norwegian companies by name, industry code (NACE) or municipality — the entry point for KYC onboarding, prospecting and supplier-risk flows.
Full decision-ready company profile — gr: Full decision-ready company profile — group structure, owners, grants, announcements and financial metrics in one call. Use the field selector to enrich only the sections your flow needs.
Ownership tree for UBO discovery and gro: Ownership tree for UBO discovery and group mapping — traverse who owns the company (up), what it owns (down), or both.
Board, managing director, signatory, pro: Board, managing director, signatory, procuration and auditor roles — the people to screen in KYC and due-diligence flows.
Annual accounts and key figures (revenue: Annual accounts and key figures (revenue, operating result, equity, debt) for credit assessment and financial health checks.
Patents, trademarks and designs register: Patents, trademarks and designs registered with the Norwegian Industrial Property Office (Patentstyret) — totals, active counts and per-case links.
BRREG legal-event announcements (bankrup: BRREG legal-event announcements (bankruptcy, mergers, signatory changes) and recent changes for one company — the audit trail behind re-screening decisions. Without limit/cursor all announcements are returned.
Aggregated risk and growth signals — KYC: Aggregated risk and growth signals — KYC announcements, financial distress (FIV), hiring signals, merger relations, funding, beneficial owners — one call for a portfolio-monitoring verdict.
Companies sharing role holders, business: Companies sharing role holders, business address or significant owners (≥10 %) with a source company — expand a KYC case to its network.
Cross-company network analysis: common p: Cross-company network analysis: common persons, addresses, owners, auditor and parent companies plus circular-ownership indicators with a combined score — uncover hidden links between 2 or more counterparties. Requires the koblingsanalyse extension.
Side-by-side financial comparison of up: Side-by-side financial comparison of up to 5 companies with aligned metric/year matrices — benchmark suppliers or acquisition targets.
Typo-tolerant name search across shareho: Typo-tolerant name search across shareholders and role holders — find the person keys used by the person-profile actions. Requires full-ownership access (person data is sensitive).
Complete role history (active + historic: Complete role history (active + historic) for one person across all companies — the cross-orgnr view behind director screening.
All companies a person owns shares in, w: All companies a person owns shares in, with ownership percentages and share values — map a beneficial owner’s full portfolio.
Name-based screening for repeat-bankrupt: Name-based screening for repeat-bankruptcy exposure ("konkursgjenganger"): leadership roles a person held in companies that later went bankrupt, tenure-weighted. The match is name-based — treat hits as review flags, not verdicts. Requires full-ownership access.
Screen a person against sanctions and PE: Screen a person against sanctions and PEP lists (exact + fuzzy matching) as part of KYC onboarding or periodic review. Requires a signed DPA and a per-call confirmation; every request is written to a 60-month audit trail.
Start an audit-grade AML report in the b: Start an audit-grade AML report in the background and get a report id immediately — poll with "Get AML Report" until done. Avoids timeouts on large ownership trees and lets you fan out many screenings in parallel. Requires a signed DPA; reports are retained for 60 months.
Poll the status of an async AML report s: Poll the status of an async AML report started with "Start AML Report". Returns pending/running/done/failed — with score, level and report links (JSON + PDF) when done.
Transparent company risk score (0-100) w: Transparent company risk score (0-100) with level (low/moderate/high/critical) and a full component breakdown — company health, not personal credit. Requires the risk-scoring extension and a one-time disclaimer confirmation (see "Confirm Risk Score Disclaimer").
Portfolio risk-scoring of up to 50 compa: Portfolio risk-scoring of up to 50 companies in one call — each orgnr is scored in parallel and returned with its own result or per-orgnr error. Ideal for scheduled supplier- or portfolio-screening flows.
Deterministic \"company in difficulty\": Deterministic "company in difficulty" assessment under the statutory a-e rules (based on the latest accounts + interim-balance overlay) — required for state-aid eligibility checks and useful as a distress flag.
Portfolio distress-screening (\"company: Portfolio distress-screening ("company in difficulty", statutory a-e rules) of up to 50 companies in one call. Per-orgnr compliance gates are returned as per-orgnr errors — the bulk call itself always succeeds.
One-time confirmation of the risk-scorin: One-time confirmation of the risk-scoring pre-screening disclaimer via API (idempotent). Fetch the exact disclaimer text and version from GET /api/v1/risikoscoring/disclaimer, then confirm here — after that, "Get Risk Score" stops returning kundebekreftelse_required.
All companies in a NACE industry code (p: All companies in a NACE industry code (prefix match) with status, municipality and size filters — build market lists and monitoring portfolios by industry.
Search or browse the Norwegian NACE indu: Search or browse the Norwegian NACE industry-code catalogue — resolve the exact code before subscribing to industry events or listing companies. Free-text search, hierarchy walk, or EU→NO conversion.
Cross-company search in BRREG legal-even: Cross-company search in BRREG legal-event announcements with type, date and free-text filters — find bankruptcies, mergers and dissolutions across the whole register.
Public grants and support through the wh: Public grants and support through the whole corporate group — NAV, state-aid register, Innovasjon Norge and SkatteFUNN — as a tree with per-company amounts plus a group aggregate on the root node.
Flat list of individual public-grant awa: Flat list of individual public-grant awards for a company with source filtering — feed grant histories into spreadsheets and reports.
Convert a NOK amount to EUR, USD, GBP, S: Convert a NOK amount to EUR, USD, GBP, SEK or DKK using daily Norges Bank rates — show Norwegian financials in the recipient's currency. Omit the amount for rate metadata only.
Name: Name
Industry filter — division (47) or full: Industry filter — division (47) or full code (47.110).
Maximum number of results per page (1-10: Maximum number of results per page (1-100).
Opaque pagination token from the previou: Opaque pagination token from the previous response (`next_cursor`). Leave empty for the first page.
Optional sections to enrich the profile: Optional sections to enrich the profile with. "IP rights" fetches patents, trademarks and designs from the Norwegian Industrial Property Office (slower — external lookup).
Restrict to a single role type. Leave em: Restrict to a single role type. Leave empty for all roles.
Number of financial years to include (1-: Number of financial years to include (1-10).
Accept cached figures even if the underl: Accept cached figures even if the underlying snapshot is older than the normal freshness window (retrospective analysis).
Maximum number of results per page (1-20: Maximum number of results per page (1-200).
ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Overrides the def: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Overrides the default 730-day lookback (capped at 1825 days).
Minimum number of shared persons/owners: Minimum number of shared persons/owners to count as related.
Two or more nine-digit organisation numb: Two or more nine-digit organisation numbers to analyse.
Number of financial years to align (1-10: Number of financial years to align (1-10).
Metrics to include. Leave empty for the: Metrics to include. Leave empty for the default set.
Stable role-person key from Search Perso: Stable role-person key from Search Persons (`role_persons[].id`).
Stable owner-person key from Search Pers: Stable owner-person key from Search Persons (`shareholders[].id`).
Optional birth year (1900-2100) to sharp: Optional birth year (1900-2100) to sharpen matching.
Purpose recorded in the audit trail (sen: Purpose recorded in the audit trail (sent as `X-FR-Purpose`). Required by the Firmaradar DPA gate for AML endpoints.
Confirm that a signed data processing ag: Confirm that a signed data processing agreement (DPA) with Firmaradar covers this screening. Sent as `X-FR-DPA-Confirmed`. The call is rejected without this confirmation.
Optional unique key — retries with the s: Optional unique key — retries with the same key return the original response instead of starting a duplicate report.
Job id returned by \"Start AML Report (A: Job id returned by "Start AML Report (Async)".
Up to 50 nine-digit Norwegian organisati: Up to 50 nine-digit Norwegian organisation numbers. Each entry may also contain comma- or space-separated values.
Accept FIV data even when the underlying: Accept FIV data even when the underlying snapshot is older than the normal freshness window (retrospective screening). Use sparingly.
Must match the current disclaimer versio: Must match the current disclaimer version, e.g. v1.
Exact disclaimer text (full-text match): Exact disclaimer text (full-text match) as returned by the disclaimer endpoint.
Industry code or prefix, e.g. 47, 47.11: Industry code or prefix, e.g. 47, 47.11 or 47.110.
Free-text search on the Norwegian label.
Return the direct children of this code: Return the direct children of this code (hierarchy walk).
EU NACE Rev. 2 code — returns the Norweg: EU NACE Rev. 2 code — returns the Norwegian level-5 subgroups.
Substring match on the announcement type: Substring match on the announcement type, e.g. konkurs.
Restrict to one nine-digit organisation: Restrict to one nine-digit organisation number.
NOK amount to convert. Leave empty for r: NOK amount to convert. Leave empty for rate metadata only.
Fires when a monitored company gets a ne: Fires when a monitored company gets a new BRREG announcement, an ownership change or a public-grant change — the building block for KYC re-screening and supplier-risk monitoring flows. Requires company monitoring (firmaovervåkning) on the account.
Fires when any company in a NACE industr: Fires when any company in a NACE industry code is created, updated, deleted or changes status — with geography and size filters. Watch a whole market instead of one company. Requires company monitoring (firmaovervåkning) on the account.
Nine-digit Norwegian organisation number: Nine-digit Norwegian organisation number to monitor.
Optional secret Firmaradar sends back as: Optional secret Firmaradar sends back as `Authorization: Bearer` on every delivery, so you can verify the sender.
Event types to deliver. Leave empty for: Event types to deliver. Leave empty for all types.
